name: Tuition Ke Baad
overview:
Tuition plays a pivotal role in almost everyone's life. Not only from the education perspective but everything that comes with it friends, crushes, the after-Tuition party, fooling parents in the name of Tuition fees. So to relive those carefree days, Alright brings you Tuition Ke Baad, because all that happens in class gets resolved only after tuition.

Aashiq, Tantrik, Sholey, and Jhatarburg study at the same tuition center. What happens when Aashiq falls in love and the gang decides to help him woo the girl?

trailers.title: Alright! | Tuition Ke Baad | Official Trailer | Abhishek, Mugdha, Ritik, Sanyam & Suraj
